race.description: Scottish Race Day Saturday 30 May Hcp (C2)
race.comment: MATCHSTICKS (6) has shown promising signs at the trials in readiness for this. She was a track and trip winner last campaign when leading throughout and her form last campaign stacks right up. She looks ready to fire on resumption. TROOPER (3) ran away for an impressive win at Bathurst last time out after a good win here two back over 1000m. He has the speed to roll across from out wide and if he can run up to what he did last time out, he'll be hard to hold out once again. BUTTON UP (1) comes back to Country level today after ending up 4.4L off the winner at Newcastle most recently. Draw makes things a little tricky, but if he gets some luck in the run then he can make his presence felt at the finish. COSSACK WARRIOR (2) is Brodie Loy's returning ride and can feature off a freshen. SHOREMAN (7) had been knocking on the door and was too good last time out. Not out of this on the back of that effort.
